field.name: contract_json
field.eval: { 'view_orchestration': { 'context': { 'source': 'smart_construction_core.product_release', 'source_status': 'product_release' }, 'views': { 'form': { 'title': '设备申请', 'composition_mode': 'entry_semantic_surface', 'columns': 2, 'sections': [ {'title': '办理主信息', 'sequence': 10, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['state', 'name', 'equipment_request_document_no_display', 'equipment_request_contract_no_display']}, {'title': '项目与供应单位', 'sequence': 20, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['project_id', 'plan_id', 'supplier_id', 'equipment_request_contract_title_display']}, {'title': '申请与需用信息', 'sequence': 30, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['requester_id', 'request_date', 'required_date', 'usage_location']}, {'title': '数量与金额边界', 'sequence': 40, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['quantity_total', 'amount_total', 'invoice_amount', 'paid_amount', 'unpaid_amount', 'uninvoiced_amount', 'tax_rate_text', 'vat_type_text', 'currency_id']}, {'title': '申请明细', 'sequence': 50, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['line_ids']}, {'title': '说明与附件', 'sequence': 60, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['note', 'equipment_request_rental_content_display', 'message_attachment_count']}, {'title': '来源追溯', 'sequence': 70, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['legacy_fact_model', 'legacy_fact_id', 'legacy_fact_type', 'source_created_by', 'equipment_request_source_created_by_display', 'source_created_at', 'active']} ], 'fields': [ 'sequence': 100, 'group_title': '申请与需用信息'}, {'name': 'required_date', 'sequence': 110, 'group_title': '申请与需用信息'}, {'name': 'usage_location', 'sequence': 120, 'group_title': '申请与需用信息'}, {'name': field.name: contract_json
field.eval: { 'view_orchestration': { 'context': { 'source': 'smart_construction_core.product_release', 'source_status': 'product_release' }, 'views': { 'form': { 'title': '设备结算', 'composition_mode': 'entry_semantic_surface', 'columns': 2, 'sections': [ {'title': '办理主信息', 'sequence': 10, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['state', 'equipment_settlement_document_status_display', 'name']}, {'title': '项目与供应单位', 'sequence': 20, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['project_id', 'supplier_id']}, {'title': '经办与结算内容', 'sequence': 30, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['settlement_date', 'owner_id', 'settlement_content']}, {'title': '结算金额', 'sequence': 40, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['amount_untaxed', 'tax_amount', 'amount_total', 'currency_id']}, {'title': '付款与申请边界', 'sequence': 50, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['equipment_settlement_payment_status_display', 'payment_paid_amount', 'payment_unpaid_amount', 'equipment_settlement_payment_request_status_display', 'payment_requested_amount', 'payment_unrequested_amount']}, {'title': '结算明细', 'sequence': 60, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['line_ids']}, {'title': '说明与附件', 'sequence': 70, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['note', 'message_attachment_count']}, {'title': '来源追溯', 'sequence': 80, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['legacy_fact_model', 'legacy_fact_id', 'legacy_fact_type', 'equipment_settlement_source_created_by_display', 'source_created_at', 'active']} ], 'fields': [ {'name': 'state', 'sequence': 10, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'equipment_settlement_document_status_display', 'sequence': 20,
